prose:
**Phenol Fukui reactivity result — computed.** Method used: DFT tier `standard` with explicit **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (`--functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp`; no `--density-fit` flag was used), PySCF/Mulliken charges as reported by chemkit, **gas phase** (`solvent: null`), parent charge 0 and multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`; the Fukui calculation used N, N−1, and N+1 charge states at this geometry. Cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Software version was not reported by the tool.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 3 (1-based), carbon, with **f+ = 2.1028319**. Most nucleophilic site = atom 1 (1-based), oxygen, with **f− = 0.16201477**.

Per-atom results in input atom order (`atom_label_1based: symbol`):

| atom | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 O | -0.99513677 | 0.16201477 | -0.416561 | -1.1571515 |
| 2 C | 0.39933189 | 0.048772551 | 0.22405222 | 0.35055934 |
| 3 C | 2.1028319 | 0.070972379 | 1.0869021 | 2.0318595 |
| 4 C | 1.6196806 | 0.070498539 | 0.84508955 | 1.549182 |
| 5 C | -0.34200645 | 0.026704972 | -0.15765074 | -0.36871142 |
| 6 C | -0.28910826 | 0.020949414 | -0.13407942 | -0.31005767 |
| 7 C | 1.3079753 | 0.12351549 | 0.7157454 | 1.1844598 |
| 8 H | -0.73391778 | 0.082321145 | -0.32579832 | -0.81623892 |
| 9 H | -0.27465615 | 0.088147788 | -0.09325418 | -0.36280394 |
| 10 H | -0.91706058 | 0.081105985 | -0.4179773 | -0.99816657 |
| 11 H | -0.62991625 | 0.080487046 | -0.2747146 | -0.7104033 |
| 12 H | -0.29591676 | 0.09349577 | -0.1012105 | -0.38941253 |
| 13 H | 0.047899335 | 0.051014152 | 0.049456744 | -0.003114817 |

**Integrity:** chemkit reported `integrity.trustworthy: true` (`status: ok`). No `warnings` array was returned by the tool. Integrity check details returned by the tool were:
- `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `common header present`

**Artifacts / reproducibility:** plot: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-191342_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Exact command reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpp0ixx5qn/live.json`. The chemkit result did not return a live `.out` log path, so I cannot report an exact `.out` path without guessing.
